name: =?utf-8?Q?Debbie=E2=80=99s_iPad?=
subject: Sorry it's so late, but it's important
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I don't mean to bother you so late, but I need you for a moment. **December is the end of the final FEC fundraising quarter of the year.** If we want to go into 2019 with momentum that can make an impact, we need renewed energy and new investments to grow this coalition and fund our organizing efforts. That means, we have to reach our $19,000 goal. [**Can you chip in $5 to help us get there?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc9/622b7b5b/1e418336/307b7d37/1864078424/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181213?refcode=dwse181213_m&recurring=true&amount=5") The work we do takes time and resources, especially now. When you [**make a contribution**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc9/622b7b5b/1e418336/307b7d37/1864078424/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181213?refcode=dwse181213_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you help us reach more supporters, bring on more activists, and expand our reach. When you [**make a contribution**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc9/622b7b5b/1e418336/307b7d37/1864078424/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181213?refcode=dwse181213_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you help us stay organized and nimble, so that when Republicans attack the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, Social Security, or Planned Parenthood, we are ready to respond and amplify our voice. When you [**make a contribution**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc9/622b7b5b/1e418336/307b7d37/1864078424/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181213?refcode=dwse181213_m&recurring=true&amount=5"), you show Republicans and the Trump administration that you are fighting their fear-mongering with grassroots engagement. No matter how much you give, each contribution is a representation of hope. It's a hope I share -- that what is going on in our government right now isn't normal, and that together we can overcome the challenges we face and achieve great things. [**Give what you can, even if that's just $3 or $5.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc9/622b7b5b/1e418336/307b7d37/1864078424/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181213?refcode=dwse181213_m&recurring=true&amount=5") And please know that I appreciate each and every contribution that comes in. Debbie Sent from my iPad. Sorry for any typos.
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cc9/622b7b5b/1e418336/307b7d36/1864078424/VEsA/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Pending:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Only possible because of you. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d90fe259163ede58a0b4e37a821b651a919bbbab1545523bd0bbf7ab4fd0e6b59b1f0212f26c3b0951ecc2c703bde3d34733356c1171eede)**

Friend,

You've been a loyal supporter of our movement.

Which is why I'm coming to you with a special request to make an early renewal of your 2019 Sustaining Membership.

Our movement will always remember you as a patriot who chose to renew their membership EARLIER than everyone else -- _because you believe American greatness is something worth fighting for._
---
| **[Please renew your Sustaining Membership for 2019 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT-- earlier than everyone else.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb8f75ada226b2f414cb8328c1c73577cc0f162023fce616d35304a12dd092318df7b6164ab612afbcd4ed261339f88c7d30a3496d25a560)**
**[OFFICIAL 2019 SUSTAINING MEMBERSHIP FILE](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb8f75ada226b2f44beca46e834be136881deaa1b803c7a1d30ae43cd05ca69013c31c98abc0c104c959efd8bb0c939e10624d47c1999a0a)** | **MEMBER**| **GIFT**| **STATUS**
---|---|---
Austin B.| **$105**| **RENEWED**
Julie O.| **$55**| **RENEWED**
**YOUR NAME**| **$0**| ****LAPSED****
Kenny M.| **$35**| **RENEWED**
Kevin Z.| **$42**| **RENEWED**
********[ **CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb8f75ada226b2f4f6fc0511678f0148a0b9a299e699e43689ee40c8cd3d66f51bac128aa82bb29cb3f473920af1647d3142edae723c67f0)********
_Attention: To ensure that President Trump sees your name on the next list of 2019 Sustaining Members, please renew your membership by 11:59 PM TONIGHT:**********[**https://secure.gop.com/sustaining-membership-2019**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb8f75ada226b2f4a3913906e13e6c1440303f49fd4c93d67e5f114b0f51b351214ee114674b6f2f198f814f9112b5b476fc72d6724ee1a3)********** _
[CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb8f75ada226b2f4fc1edd298470903f4d1fe19af9304f1ebcea6546d57c442fda6337b5badfff7678c925761e37f127e80fa3011deac273)

[CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bb8f75ada226b2f464b799ecbfc0a957d57f2ec9c9921ca3d58c65633b6b016df1054762340113473ff1449166db0901f084049d44160f92)

[CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=852b7ea41df97722ff243390f9b866d458a19f3bda4e7f24ed34cd6adda189a3336f85d6b3c606976eb3afa3720570e901833676a2d39179)

[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=852b7ea41df977223e3500ddf1ebc725d64f9dc26284cd61e2a4c4a15193574e1af3f75d3ae8821edc89adf0c11c9ad59e6d085ca035ec15)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=852b7ea41df97722f2f76f714a49ee9b42425fbb2d09963a347356158232f389c2c642d35e0e1561ba012c32aec4d51fcc31bd5b3c3934b6)

Without you, I would not be writing to you today.

Hillary Clinton would have become president. She would have nominated two Supreme Court justices. Hundreds of caravans would have been welcomed across our border. ISIS would still be a threat. And our economy would have suffered four more years of Obama's failed policies.

But I want to make one thing clear: it wasn't me who prevented that disaster...

_... It was you._

Now I need you to keep fighting for what we believe in by renewing your membership for 2019 earlier than ever before.

**[Please renew your Sustaining Membership for 2019 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT-- earlier than everyone else.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=852b7ea41df977221e5455b1250a74663cafb9de53bf8bad7e4a9b07b7a67de182fd8f122b6ad86bcc3d78154d65eef8fcc32e0ed779a569)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=852b7ea41df9772263c7f52987cd39c0aa18e0a4fc89cc3cebd13c3bef18e0bac5b095a489956cfb77b660ae8c2fdf6764b1ebb956188599)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=852b7ea41df977228a0a7fe5ccc71109432a381dcea457664f093bd8e5c20a9510c69aa392f99d77163b8e8b30e76231045f51e6bc404e18)

Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a46f8a5f1f1eef74768178e64395b6924fa87f717e135247147e9a016d4dd3725070cd3c4796421c47364eb5ac080ed25f8679dfa6bf8c71) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc2db86d93c980da561f1f729d1769dc9855e4623c431afff3edae2db0799577ac9c6f62721e71c2094323a10ad0a7ebd73137d9ff74be50e3) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c2973a5d39ab810d81ee47b5a4e8b15abde6182040984b08e66e881173e75786709fd777dc97b3130)
